message:
revert(storage): restore NOT IN form of ready-issues blocker filter

Reverts 0fd8611f. The NOT IN → NOT EXISTS rewrite was correct in
isolation but did not match the column nullability the
blocked_issues_cache schema actually has: `issue_id` is declared NOT
NULL with a covering index, so the NULL-safety argument that
motivated the rewrite never applied here. The optimizer also already
specialized the original NOT IN form (because the subquery's column
is NOT NULL it can be lowered to a hash anti-join), so the
performance argument doesn't apply either.

Restoring the original keeps the SQL one-liner and matches the form
referenced from the surrounding comment block. Future work should
profile both forms against a real cache before changing this again.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
